MINI MINUTES FOR MAY-26-26 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCES. JUDGE VAN AKEN IS RECUSED PURSUANT TO A SEPARATE WRITTEN ORDER. THIS MATTER IS TRANSFERRED TO DEPARTMENT 501 AT 9:30 A.M. ON TO BE HEARD ON THE SAME DATE BY VISITING JUDGE, HON. DENNIS HAYASHI, PER THE ORDER OF THE PRESIDING JUDGE. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, NOT REPORTED

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANTS DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. (SEE COMPLETE RULING IN THE MINI MINUTES)PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT PROPOSED ORDER THAT IS IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). VISITING JUDGE: DENNIS HAYASHI; CLERK: K. VALDES; NOT REPORTED. (D501)
